title: Final E2E Smoke Test Pass
notes: Flows A–G and matrix 1–7 traced against AgencyControllerView, modelPhotosSupabase, ModelMediaSettingsPanel, ClientWebApp, clientDiscoverySupabase, inviteDelivery, finalizePendingInviteOrClaim, modelsImportSupabase, apiService.js.
No new defects warranted a minimal app-code fix without RPC/discovery scope change.
Ranked get_discovery_models returns models.city only; Near Me uses location_city — documented as display nuance, not a frontend bug.
Prior lifecycle fixes RC-1–RC-8 remain the authoritative baseline (CURSOR_FINAL_AGENCY_MODEL_LIFECYCLE_PLAN.json).
closing_line: FINAL E2E SMOKE PASS COMPLETE — MINOR RISKS REMAIN
